name: AgentHaus
description: A comprehensive marketplace of production-ready Claude agents and plugins for Claude Code and Cowork. Features specialized plugins for development, productivity, content creation, and cloud management.

plugins.name: social-media
plugins.description: Generate high-engagement social posts for Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram and Facebook with trend analysis and content-writer agents.

plugins.name: github-integration
plugins.description: Manage GitHub issues and pull requests through custom commands and the GitHub MCP server.

plugins.name: notion-workspace
plugins.description: Search and update Notion pages and databases via the Notion MCP server.

plugins.name: clickup-tasks
plugins.description: Create and manage ClickUp tasks, lists and time tracking using the ClickUp MCP server.

plugins.name: playwright-testing
plugins.description: Write and execute end-to-end browser tests with Playwright and a QA engineer subagent.

plugins.name: context7-docs
plugins.description: Fetch hallucination-free documentation for any library using Context7.

plugins.name: cloudflare-platform
plugins.description: Deploy Cloudflare Workers, manage KV storage and interact with AI Gateway via Cloudflare MCP servers.

plugins.name: neon-db
plugins.description: Interact with serverless Postgres databases on Neon using the Postgres MCP server.

plugins.name: vercel-deploy
plugins.description: Manage Vercel projects and deployments through the Vercel MCP server.

plugins.name: devops-flow
plugins.description: Integrated DevOps workflow combining Cloudflare deployments, GitHub PR management, and Slack notifications with hooks.

plugins.name: knowledge-synapse
plugins.description: Knowledge retrieval combining Context7 documentation, Notion notes, and Google Drive with intelligent synthesis.

plugins.name: task-commander
plugins.description: Unified task management with ClickUp, Slack notifications, Gmail integration, and Google Calendar scheduling.

plugins.name: qa-droid
plugins.description: Automated QA workflow with Playwright testing, Slack/Gmail result notifications, and test report generation.

plugins.name: data-core
plugins.description: Advanced Neon/Postgres database operations with migration support and query optimization.

plugins.name: marketplace-cli
plugins.description: CLI utilities for searching, browsing, and managing AgentHaus marketplace plugins.
